headline: Con Edison Announces $2 Billion At-The-Market (ATM) Equity Offering Program
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. ("Con Edison") (NYSE: ED) today announced a $2 billion ATM equity offering program pursuant to which it may sell its common shares ($.10 par value). Con Edison has entered into an Equity Distribution Agreement (the "Equity Distribution Agreement") with Barclays Capital Inc., BNY Mellon Capital Markets, LLC, BofA Securities, CIBC Capital Markets, Jefferies LLC, J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, KeyBanc Capital Markets Inc., Mizuho Securities USA LLC, Scotia Capital (USA) Inc.,

headline: Consolidated Edison Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: ED posts Q1 revenue growth across electric, gas and steam segments, but adjusted earnings miss estimates as expenses climb.
